vars.description: The final blackboard: variable name → value.

slaMs.description: Total scheduled SLA/timer duration in milliseconds.

correlations.description: The correlation id injected on each `external-task` submit (doc 04 §2.8, doc 05 §11.1), in step order; empty for flows with no delegation.

description:
The interpreter's output contract (doc 04 §2/§5) — the deterministic result of walking a Flow: the
final blackboard, the scheduled SLA total, the per-step `trace`, and the ordered Case/Task `events`,
all keyed by the Case's global `caseId`. This is the source material the DecisionRecord assembles.
